sevenDay.synopsis: Our SE training areas are IFR, but it's all good locally. Expect VFR conditions and NEG hazards thru the rest of the workweek and right on thru the weekend. The nice weather continues next week with no mention of rain til at least the middle of next week. And VFR skies will continue!
sevenDay.title: 7-DAY OUTLOOK: 13 MAY - 19 MAY
